name: Check Anthropic API budget vs hard stop
description: Returns this month's spend, the alert threshold ($50), and the hard stop ($100), with current status (OK / WARNING / HARD_STOP).
trigger_examples: what's my API spend this month
how close to the hard stop are we
prompt_template: Call executeTool('check_budget', {}). Format the response as: $X.XX / $100 (P%). Status: OK|WARNING|HARD_STOP.
